member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.CrossFirebaseFunctions.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize Functions with a specific region.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.CrossFirebaseFunctions.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IFirebaseFunctions
member.summary: FirebaseFunctions lets you call Cloud Functions for Firebase.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IFirebaseFunctions.GetHttpsCallable(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a reference to the Callable HTTPS trigger with the given name.
member.param: The name of the Callable HTTPS trigger.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IFirebaseFunctions.UseEmulator(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Modifies this FirebaseFunctions instance to communicate with the Cloud Functions emulator. Note: Call this method before using the instance to do any functions operations.
member.param: The emulator host (for example, 10.0.2.2 on android and localhost on iOS)

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IHttpsCallable
member.summary: A reference to a particular Callable HTTPS trigger in Cloud Functions.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IHttpsCallable.CallAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Executes this Callable HTTPS trigger asynchronously without any parameters. The request to the Cloud Functions backend made by this method automatically includes a Firebase Instance ID token to identify the app instance. If a user is logged in with Firebase Auth, an auth ID token for the user is also automatically included.
member.param: Optional data in json format that gets attached to the request.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.IHttpsCallable.CallAsync``1(System.String)
member.summary: Executes this Callable HTTPS trigger asynchronously without any parameters. The request to the Cloud Functions backend made by this method automatically includes a Firebase Instance ID token to identify the app instance. If a user is logged in with Firebase Auth, an auth ID token for the user is also automatically included.
member.param: Optional data in json format that gets attached to the request.
member.typeparam: The type that gets returned in a successful call by the Cloud Function.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Functions.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
